scenarios.title: Basic Price Query - English
scenarios.description: Simple price inquiry for tomatoes in English

steps.input: What is the current price of tomatoes?
steps.expected_response: Current tomato prices range from ₹35-55 per kg depending on variety and market. Hybrid tomatoes in Hyderabad are ₹40/kg, while cherry tomatoes in Mumbai are ₹55/kg.

steps.input: Which market has the best price?
steps.expected_response: Delhi has the most affordable tomatoes at ₹35/kg for desi variety, while premium varieties are available in Mumbai and Bangalore.

scenarios.title: Multilingual Price Query - Hindi
scenarios.description: Price inquiry in Hindi with translation

steps.expected_translation: What is the price of tomatoes?
steps.expected_response: टमाटर की कीमत किस्म और बाजार के आधार पर ₹35-55 प्रति किलो है। हैदराबाद में हाइब्रिड टमाटर ₹40/किलो है।

steps.input: कौन सा बाजार सबसे सस्ता है?
steps.expected_response: दिल्ली में देसी टमाटर सबसे सस्ते ₹35/किलो में मिल रहे हैं।

steps.speaker: vendor_1
steps.expected_translation: I will sell 100 kg onions for ₹32 per kg
steps.ai_mediation: Current market rate for onions is ₹30-35/kg. Vendor's price is within fair range.

steps.speaker: buyer_1
steps.input: Can you do ₹28 per kg? That's my budget.
steps.expected_translation: మీరు కిలోకు ₹28 చేయగలరా? అది నా బడ్జెట్.
steps.ai_mediation: Buyer's offer is below market rate. Suggest compromise at ₹30/kg.

steps.speaker: ai_mediator
steps.input: Based on current market rates, I suggest ₹30/kg as a fair compromise. This is the standard rate in Hyderabad market.
steps.expected_translation_te: ప్రస్తుత మార్కెట్ రేట్ల ఆధారంగా, నేను కిలోకు ₹30 న్యాయమైన రాజీగా సూచిస్తున్నాను।

scenarios.title: Market Trend Analysis - Tamil
scenarios.description: Comprehensive market analysis request in Tamil

steps.input: காய்கறி சந்தையில் இந்த வாரம் என்ன போக்கு?
steps.expected_translation: What is the trend in the vegetable market this week?
steps.expected_response: இந்த வாரம் காய்கறி விலைகள் நிலையாக உள்ளன. தக்காளி மற்றும் வெங்காயம் விலை சற்று அதிகரித்துள்ளது.

steps.expected_translation: Which vegetables have decreased in price?
steps.expected_response: உருளைக்கிழங்கு மற்றும் கோஸ் விலை கடந்த வாரத்தை விட குறைந்துள்ளது।

scenarios.title: Bulk Purchase Negotiation
scenarios.description: Large quantity purchase with multiple vendors

steps.speaker: buyer_bulk
steps.input: I need bulk quantities: 500kg tomatoes, 300kg onions, 400kg potatoes. What's your best price?
steps.expected_translation: मुझे बल्क मात्रा चाहिए: 500 किलो टमाटर, 300 किलो प्याज, 400 किलो आलू। आपका सबसे अच्छा दाम क्या है?
steps.ai_mediation: For bulk orders, typical discount is 5-10% below market rate.

steps.speaker: vendor_multi
steps.input: बल्क ऑर्डर के लिए मैं 5% छूट दे सकता हूं। टमाटर ₹38, प्याज ₹28, आलू ₹23 प्रति किलो।
steps.expected_translation: For bulk order, I can give 5% discount. Tomatoes ₹38, onions ₹28, potatoes ₹23 per kg.
steps.ai_mediation: Vendor's bulk pricing is competitive. Total cost would be ₹36,800 for requested quantities.

steps.input: Compare mango prices across different seasons
steps.expected_response: Mango prices vary significantly by season. Peak season (April-June): ₹80-120/kg, Off-season: ₹200-300/kg. Alphonso variety commands premium prices.

steps.input: When is the best time to buy mangoes in bulk?
steps.expected_response: Best time for bulk mango purchase is May-June when prices are lowest and quality is highest. Avoid off-season purchases for cost efficiency.

scenarios.title: Quality-based Pricing
scenarios.description: Understanding price differences based on quality grades

steps.input: What's the difference between premium and standard quality tomatoes?
steps.expected_response: Premium tomatoes (₹40-55/kg): Better appearance, longer shelf life, uniform size. Standard tomatoes (₹25-35/kg): Good for cooking, shorter shelf life, mixed sizes.

steps.input: Which quality should I choose for my restaurant?
steps.expected_response: For restaurants, standard quality is often sufficient for cooking dishes, while premium quality is better for salads and presentation. Consider your menu requirements and budget.

english: What is the price of tomatoes today?
Compare onion prices across different markets
I want to buy 100 kg potatoes, what's your best price?
Show me market trends for vegetables this week
Which crops are most profitable right now?
What's the difference between premium and standard quality?
hindi: आज टमाटर का भाव क्या है?
प्याज की कीमत अलग-अलग मंडियों में कितनी है?
मुझे 100 किलो आलू चाहिए, आपका सबसे अच्छा दाम क्या है?
इस हफ्ते सब्जियों का बाजार कैसा है?
अभी कौन सी फसल में सबसे ज्यादा फायदा है?
प्रीमियम और स्टैंडर्ड क्वालिटी में क्या अंतर है?
telugu: నాకు 100 కిలోల బంగాళాదుంపలు కావాలి, మీ బెస్ట్ ప్రైస్ ఎంత?
ఈ వారం కూరగాయల మార్కెట్ ట్రెండ్ ఎలా ఉంది?
ఇప్పుడు ఏ పంటలో ఎక్కువ లాభం ఉంది?
ప్రీమియం మరియు స్టాండర్డ్ క్వాలిటీలో తేడా ఏమిటి?
tamil: எனக்கு 100 கிலோ உருளைக்கிழங்கு வேண்டும், உங்கள் சிறந்த விலை என்ன?
இந்த வாரம் காய்கறி சந்தை போக்கு எப்படி உள்ளது?
இப்போது எந்த பயிரில் அதிக லாபம் உள்ளது?
பிரீமியம் மற்றும் ஸ்டாண்டர்ட் தரத்தில் என்ன வித்தியாசம்?
